title: Homemade Brownies
instructions:
Grease a 13 x 9 baking dish and set aside.
In a large bowl mix the the butter, sugar and vanilla. Beat in the eggs until well blended,
Stir in the flour, cocoa, baking powder and salt. Blend well.
Spread the batter in the prepared dish and bake for 50-55 minutes. Or until knife inserted in the center comes out clean.
